selection.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.

Return ONLY a single-line JSON object, with no extra text, no markdown, no comments.

response_raw:
{
"mode": "human",
"topic": "How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.",
"opinion": "To manage and deal with fake content on social media, it's important to have a critical eye when viewing posts. Be skeptical of information that seems too good (or bad) to be true. Check the source of the information and verify its accuracy through fact-checking websites or reputable news sources. Additionally, use social media platforms' built-in features to report suspicious or fake content. By being vigilant and proactive, you can help to reduce the amount of fake content on social media and keep your online communities safe and informed.",

response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
response_parsed.opinion: To manage and deal with fake content on social media, it's important to have a critical eye when viewing posts. Be skeptical of information that seems too good (or bad) to be true. Check the source of the information and verify its accuracy through fact-checking websites or reputable news sources. Additionally, use social media platforms' built-in features to report suspicious or fake content. By being vigilant and proactive, you can help to reduce the amount of fake content on social media and keep your online communities safe and informed.
response_parsed.reasoning_summary: To manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is necessary to approach posts with a critical eye and verify their accuracy through fact-checking sources. Additionally, using social media platforms' reporting features can help reduce the amount of fake content available online. By taking these steps, individuals can contribute to creating a safer and more informed online community.
